text:
Iran's mission to the UN has refuted Jerusalem’s statements alleging that Tehran and its allies are plotting terrorist attacks against Israeli athletes and tourists at the Paris Olympics, News.Az reports citing Iranian media.

title: Iran denies claims of plotting attacks on Israeli athletes at Paris Olympics  | News.az
description: “Terrorist acts are not among the methods of [Islamic] resistance. Lies and deception cannot change the places of the plaintiff and the defendant,�...
